title: Residence requirement of district attorney and assistant district attorneys
doc_html:
§584.  Residence requirement of district attorney and assistant district attorneys

At least one of the assistant district attorneys provided for in R.S. 16:581 shall be a resident of the parish other than the parish in which the district attorney resides.  

Amended by Acts 1968, No. 366, §1.
